pi_items.source: Official Chinook database at https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database confirms ArtistId 90 is Iron Maiden
This is a new album to be created by the task; cannot be verified in original database
Official Chinook database only contains two price points: 0.99 (3290 tracks) and 1.99 (213 tracks). Price 1.29 does not exist in the official database and is a unique value created for this task.
This is a new naming convention for remastered tracks; cannot be verified in original database
Iron Maiden has 213 total tracks in official Chinook database (verified by querying Album ArtistId=90 and joining Track table)
Configured in task_utils.sh line 5 as CHINOOK_DB path; standard task environment setup
Configured in task_utils.sh line 6 as EXPORT_DIR; expected output location for CSV
Referenced in export_result.sh line 8 and task description as SQL script output location

technical_issues.description: Setup script uses 'invoice_items' table name (lines 34, 51, 75 in setup_task.sh) but official Chinook database uses 'InvoiceLine' (PascalCase). This will cause INSERT and JOIN operations to fail unless the database has been modified to use lowercase table names.
technical_issues.source: Comparison of setup_task.sh with official https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database schema

technical_issues.description: Task specifies UnitPrice of 1.29, but official Chinook database only contains two price points: 0.99 (regular tracks) and 1.99 (premium tracks). The task requires inserting a third unique price point.
technical_issues.source: Direct SQLite3 query of official Chinook database shows UnitPrice distribution

privileged_info_summary: The Chinook database is the official sample music store database (confirmed from https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database). ArtistId 90 is verified to be Iron Maiden with 213 total tracks available in the official database. The task requires selecting the top 10 best-selling Iron Maiden tracks and creating a new album titled 'Iron Maiden: Remastered Classics' with remastered copies priced at 1.29 (a unique price not found in the official Chinook schema, which only contains 0.99 and 1.99). Expected outputs are a CSV manifest at /home/ga/Documents/exports/new_release_manifest.csv and a SQL script at /home/ga/Documents/scripts/remaster_release.sql.
